heading: Omitted
label: 726 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to applicability of Federal and State laws on and after the date of the proclamation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 23, 1954, ch. 831, § 668 Stat. 769
